planner_strategies.strategic_objective: Clarify the nature and implications of near-constant bulk features with low unique value counts
key_checks: examine feature cardinality and near-constant value patterns across classes
assess class-conditioned distribution profiles for subtle variations
analyze dependency concentration to detect structural clustering
evaluate local label consistency around these features
success_criteria: identification of stable versus unstable low-diversity patterns
differentiation between genuine network behavior signals and representation biases
detection of any masked but relevant class-distinguishing variations
router_constraints: preserve feature scope for bulk-related backward and forward features
preserve evidence references e23 to e32

planner_strategies.strategic_objective: Investigate the stability and generalizability of the dominant destination port signal in the DDoS class
key_checks: analyze class-conditioned distribution concentration on destination port
assess shortcut-like predictive leverage of the dominant port
evaluate dependency concentration to identify structural narrowness
explore potential brittleness due to reliance on a single port
success_criteria: characterization of the dominant port’s stability across data partitions
evidence of potential shortcut signals or brittle dependencies
understanding of risks for evasion or poor generalization
router_constraints: preserve feature scope for destination port

planner_strategies.strategic_objective: Elucidate the robustness and redundancy of high-salience packet length features under class-conditioned variance
key_checks: summarize structural statistics of key packet length features
analyze distribution profiles conditioned on class labels
evaluate redundancy and dependency concentration among these features
assess shortcut-like signals and local label consistency
success_criteria: delineation of stable versus unstable dependencies in packet length features
identification of shortcut-like patterns affecting reliability
clarity on how redundancies influence feature robustness
router_constraints: preserve feature scope for Bwd Packet Length Mean, Avg Bwd Segment Size, Bwd Packet Length Max, Bwd Packet Length Std, Average Packet Size
preserve evidence references e3 to e7
